heading: Distributed energy and electric energy systems
label: 16211 Distributed energy and electric energy systems

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out programs of research, development, demonstration, and commercial application on distributed energy resources and systems reliability and efficiency, to improve the reliability and efficiency of distributed energy resources and systems, integrating advanced energy technologies with grid connectivity, including activities described in this part. The programs shall address advanced energy technologies and systems and advanced grid reliability technologies.

children.heading: Distributed energy and electric energy systems activities
children.label: 1 Distributed energy and electric energy systems activities

children.heading: Power delivery research initiative
children.label: 2 Power delivery research initiative
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out the Power Delivery Research Initiative under subsection 16215(e) of this title such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2007 through 2009.1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1

children.heading: Micro-cogeneration energy technology
children.label: c Micro-cogeneration energy technology
children.text: From amounts authorized under subsection (b), $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2007 and 2008 shall be available to carry out activities under .section 16213 of this title

children.heading: High-voltage transmission lines
children.label: d High-voltage transmission lines
children.text: From amounts authorized under subsection (b), $2,000,000 for fiscal year 2007 shall be available to carry out activities under .section 16215(g) of this title
